page_metadata.biotools__summary: PEPPER is a genome inference module based on recurrent neural networks that enables long-read variant calling and nanopore assembly polishing in the PEPPER-Margin-DeepVariant pipeline. This pipeline enables nanopore-based variant calling with DeepVariant.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PEPPER is a genome inference module based on recurrent neural networks that enables long-read variant calling and nanopore assembly polishing in the PEPPER-Margin-DeepVariant pipeline. This pipeline enables nanopore-based variant calling with DeepVariant.
